info:
Job Description

Exciting opportunities awaits you at Micron’s fast growing Shanghai Design Center. As a Firmware Engineer in Micron, you will work with an exceptionally talented core team based in Shanghai, to develop cutting-edge advanced controller firmware for NAND-based mass storage products in the consumer and enterprise segments. In this position, you will be part of the team that design, and implement firmware solutions for these target markets. You will also have the opportunity to work closely with fellow US based firmware engineers and system hardware design engineers, product engineers, Flash memory design engineers, to solve cross-functional design issues.

What you will be doing:
1. Storage FW (Front-end, FTL or back-end feature) design, implementation and integration.
2. Storage FW issue sighting, debugging and resolving, with simulator, JTAG, protocol analyzer, logic analyzer and oscilloscope.
3. Co-work with the architects to analyze the performance data, find innovative solutions and define next generation controller requirements to support BIC (best in class) productions.
4. Involved in ASIC design and verification on FPGA and ZEBU.
5. Involved in silicon bring up.

What we need to see:
1. Strong design/implementation skill in C programming. Python, assembly language and makefile or other script language experience is a plus.
2. Self-motivation, proactive and teamwork.
3. Background with storage protocol(UFS, EMMC or NVME), algorithms(page mapping, garbage collection, wear leveling, …) is a bonus.
4. Background with using JTAG, protocol analyzer, logic analyzer and oscilloscope(to capture high speed differential signal) is a bonus.

info:
As a SSD Product Validation Intern Engineer at Micron, you will be part of a forward-thinking team of engineers that solves complex problems, responsible for enabling Micron’s products with flawless and issue free release to both internal and external customers.

Job Responsibilities
1. Perform firmware validation on SSD devices which include both new and sustaining devices with new Firmware revisions.
2. Define and create new validation test plan for new SSD products.
3. Conduct failure analysis of failures generated from validation run and collaborate with various SSD Development groups to resolve issues detected.
4. Maintain and enhance Validation coverage through regular reviews and feed forward paths to ensure optimum customer integration experience and customer qualification success of SSD products.
5. Communicate project status and report on a regular basis.
6. Work closely with Manufacturing, Operational and Development Groups to ensure a smooth collaboration and alignment among teams and deliver company roadmap SSD projects on schedule.
7. Provide support in the analysis and resolution of internal/external customer issues.
8. Develop test automation solutions to improve testability and execution efficiency.


Requirements
1. Bachelor's / Master's Degree in Electrical Engineering or Semiconductor related Major.
2. Experience with SATA and/or NVMe storage interface protocols and Windows/Linux Operating Systems
3. Programming knowledge in Python and C++
4. Knowledge of storage device drivers and SATA and/or PCIE chipset register configurations would be beneficial.

info:
关于我们：
曼领艺术 | 以艺术观照生命

一元复始，三生万物。曼领艺术以“身心美”为内核，探寻身体与心灵的圆融，于艺术中感知生命的律动，唤醒人与真我、与世界的深层连接。

曼领艺术以开放、多元的姿态，营造交汇艺术、人文与生命力的场域。在此，艺术超越视觉呈现，更是思想的触点、情感的回响、身心的映现。

艺术，让存在更丰盈，让生命自在流动。

岗位职责：

3.对接拍摄需求，协调安排拍摄人员的时间，制定拍摄进度表。
4.与团队紧密合作，根据公司的品牌定位和推广策略，创作吸引人的视频内容，以提升品牌知名度。
